topic: GPT behavioral hardening follow-up for packet 031 -- ai-council subagent-only, orchestrate hardening v2, sub-agent enforcement plugin, GPT-vs-Claude benchmark, FIX-5 unpark decision

noveltyJustification: First pass of this lineage; every citation handle is newly established here.

focus: deep.md Literal-Safe Pattern Deep Read (KQ7 seed)
noveltyJustification: Extracts the generalizable determinism pattern as a reusable unit, not just a per-file observation; new contrast with orchestrate escape-hatch absence.
Pinpoints the missing deep-context/deep-review rows as the concrete judgment gap; ties the symptom to a specific table defect.
First precise mapping of the 3-layer guard to the 005 failure; converts "blocked upstream" into a testable environment spec.

focus: Decisive Smoke Procedure Design — All 4 Modes (KQ1)
noveltyJustification: Promotes the 005 procedure from "blocked attempt" to a complete, route-proof-augmented, baseline-controlled specification ready for an implementation phase.

ruledOut.approach: Re-running the smoke from inside an OpenCode session (any layer of the guard trips)
ruledOut.reason: structurally cannot clear OPENCODE_PID; proven by phase 005

noveltyJustification: Introduces a NEW mis-behavior class (mode D: GPT-vs-state-machine literalism) distinct from the A/B/C mis-route taxonomy, and cleanly separates latency from routing.
Confirms mode D as prompt-prose-driven and separable from identity/FIX-5; adds the advisory-clarity work item not present in any prior phase.

ruledOut.approach: Treating all operator symptoms as one mis-routing class
ruledOut.reason: conflates latency, routing, and state-machine literalism; fixes differ

focus: Adversarial Re-check of Mode D vs Latency Confound (KQ2)
noveltyJustification: Strengthens mode D by ruling out the latency confound via symptom-description separation; flags the unmeasured-magnitude gap for KQ6.
Quantifies three concrete breakages (command path, latency hop, depth-awareness loss) and notes the conversion is preventive-not-curative relative to reported symptoms.
Recommends AGAINST conversion with evidence (symptoms don't involve council) and offers a route-proof-header compromise that preserves the depth-0 value.

focus: Adversarial: Council Depth-0 Parallel Value Risk (KQ3)
noveltyJustification: Locks the KQ3 answer with a risk-asymmetry argument and an additive fallback; closes KQ3 with a residual-risk statement.

ruledOut.reason: removes a non-broken depth-0 parallel feature to narrow a hypothetical mis-route; symptoms do not involve council

focus: Orchestrate Hardening v2: Delegate to deep.md (KQ4)
noveltyJustification: Specifies the exact single-rule edit that makes orchestrate deep-dispatch table-lookup-grade by delegating to deep.md, with a flex-preservation boundary.
Confirms delegation is mode-resolution-only (not control), resolves the two-primary seam via the STOP rule, and names the dual-nature ambiguity residual.
Locates the enforcement plugin in system-skill-advisor reusing the registry + drift-guard, and bounds it: catches the false-negative at dispatch but cannot create hard identity.
Draws a clean detection(plugin)-vs-prevention(host) boundary and shows the plugin is implementable now without host internals or unparking 006.
Fuses the smoke and benchmark into one 8-run harness with a 2-metric design (latency + route-proof), avoiding new tooling.
Turns the benchmark into a regression gate that doubles as the FIX-5 trigger observability, closing the measurement gap from ../001 §9.
Separates routing-surface adopters (orchestrate, commands, CLI seam) from execution-surface non-adopters, preventing pattern over-application.
Identifies the two conditions (lock-routing-not-execution; retain clarification gate) that keep the pattern Claude-flex-safe, closing KQ7 with a guardrail.

ruledOut.approach: Applying the literal-safe table pattern to leaf/execution surfaces
ruledOut.reason: would harm Claude evidence-response (mode D) and remove the controlled flex-escape

noveltyJustification: Produces a concrete 8-path propagation list (6 in-scope, mirrors required, Codex explicitly deferred) with the command-seam mandatory-not-optional distinction.

ruledOut.approach: Codex (.codex/agents or .opencode/agents/*.toml) parity in this work
ruledOut.reason: mirror-location contradiction unresolved (../001 §8); out of scope

focus: Deep-Loop Family Audit for Missed Routing Seams (KQ8)
noveltyJustification: Confirms the runtime-loop list is complete and explicitly carves out improvement-family as a deferred same-pattern follow-up, not a missed seam.

focus: Adversarial: Family Members That Must NOT Be Hardened (KQ8)
noveltyJustification: Finalizes KQ8 with an explicit must-NOT-harden list that protects the three flex assets, closing the scope with guardrails.
Replaces the never-exercisable 006 trigger with a measured, sequenced, negative-gate criterion tied to the runnable KQ1 smoke + KQ6 benchmark.

focus: FIX-5 Decision: Wait on KQ1, Not Now (KQ9)
noveltyJustification: Renders a defensible wait-on-KQ1 decision with a risk-asymmetry argument and a runnable escalation path, closing KQ9.

ruledOut.approach: Unparking FIX-5 immediately on operator evidence alone
ruledOut.reason: architectural blast radius; cheaper layers unproven-insufficient; wait is reversible

noveltyJustification: Surfaces two real scoping limits (KQ4 entry-specificity, KQ5 semantic-not-caught) and a positive latency side-effect, strengthening the recommendations without overturning them.
Validates both holds by showing their mitigations (plugin, smoke, benchmark) cover the red-team attack vectors; flags the plugin as a key dependency.
Produces a 5-step dependency-ordered critical path with the irreversible decision correctly last; analytical consolidation, no new sources.
Confirms Claude mirrors are mandatory-and-bundled, Codex deferred, and the plugin is runtime-shared — no separate mirror phase needed.
Consolidates 3 residual risks + 3 deferrals + 1 integrity flag into a single defensible residual-risk table for synthesis.
Produces the concrete 008-012 (conditional) phase breakdown with an acceptance gate, and confirms full KQ coverage + no-early-convergence compliance.
